name: Spicy Steak Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Place steak in a resealable bag or shallow dish.
3. Pour the marinade over the steak and turn to coat evenly.
4. Refrigerate for about an hour.
5. When ready to cook, use the remaining marinade to baste beef every 10 minutes until done.
6. Garnish with olives if desired before serving.
